title: Moderna mFlusiva Gets Unanimous FDA Panel Endorsement
headline: FDA vaccine advisory panel votes unanimously that benefits of Moderna's mRNA flu vaccine mFlusiva outweigh risks for adults 50+, clearing a major regulatory hurdle.
key_facts: VRBPAC unanimous vote on two questions; Phase 3 trial: 26.6% relative vaccine efficacy vs. standard-dose, 47.9% vs. healthcare-utilization outcomes; PDUFA date August 5, 2026; accelerated pathway for 65+ requires Phase 4 post-marketing trial

title: NovoCure TTFields Trial Fails in Glioblastoma
headline: NovoCure's TRIDENT Phase 3 trial of Tumor Treating Fields in newly diagnosed glioblastoma misses primary overall survival endpoint, driving stock down 18%.
key_facts: NVCR stock down 17.5-18.13% in premarket; TRIDENT Phase 3 study; primary endpoint: overall survival (OS) missed; intraday range $17.36-$18.00

title: Pfizer CFO Dave Denton Departing
headline: Pfizer announces CFO Dave Denton will step down August 15 to take a position in consumer goods; stock drops 2.7%.
key_facts: Dave Denton departing August 15, 2026; Cecile Guegan named interim CFO effective Aug 15; PFE stock down 2.74-2.80% intraday June 18

title: Kardigan IPO Raises $400M
headline: Biotech startup Kardigan extends the sector's hot IPO streak, raising $400 million in its public offering.
key_facts: $400 million raised in IPO; part of five of six largest new biotech offerings since start of 2022; Parabilis IPO raised $633M+ on June 9 targeting $2.3B valuation

title: Biogen Acquires RayThera for $1 Billion
headline: Biogen acquires secretive immunology startup RayThera for $1 billion, adding immune disease pipeline assets.
key_facts: Deal value: $1 billion; RayThera focused on immune/immunology drugs; Biogen diversifying beyond neurology

title: cAMPfield Raises $180M for Gut Disease Drug
headline: Startup cAMPfield lands $180 million in financing to develop a gastrointestinal disease therapeutic.
key_facts: $180 million raised in financing; focus on gut/gastrointestinal disease drug development

title: FDA Approves Label Expansion for Capvaxive
headline: FDA approves expanded indication for Merck's pneumococcal vaccine Capvaxive.
key_facts: FDA approval of expanded label for Capvaxive pneumococcal vaccine on June 18, 2026

title: FTC Requires Aurobindo Divestiture for Lannett Acquisition
headline: FTC mandates Aurobindo divest four drug products as condition for completing its acquisition of Lannett.
key_facts: 4 drug products must be divested by Aurobindo to complete Lannett acquisition; FTC regulatory condition

title: Legend Biotech Stock Falls on $226M Public Offering
headline: Legend Biotech shares drop in premarket after pricing a $226 million public offering.
key_facts: $226 million public offering priced; stock falling on dilution concerns; maker of Carvykti CAR-T for multiple myeloma with J&J

title: Innoviva Revives Lyndra's Long-Acting Oral Platform
headline: Innoviva resurrects Lyndra Therapeutics' long-acting oral drug delivery platform with advisors including Bob Langer and Janet Woodcock.
key_facts: Innoviva revives Lyndra platform; advisors include Robert Langer (MIT) and Janet Woodcock (former FDA acting commissioner)

title: Treasury Assessing China Biotech Investment Screening
headline: U.S. Treasury Department is assessing options to screen outbound investments in China's biotech sector.
key_facts: Treasury Department evaluating mechanisms to screen American investments flowing into Chinese biotech companies; exclusive from Endpoints News
